summary: Plan-only PR remediation shard. No merge is recommended because no candidate has complete merge preflight proof including a clean Codex /review. #83227 has a concrete replacement-fix path with contributor credit; #83489 has a contributor-branch repair path; #83296 is quarantined for central security handling; #83368 and #93093 need targeted maintainer decisions.

actions.reason: The useful contributor fix is narrow and credited, but the current PR cannot be landed as-is because it is conflicting and uneditable by maintainers. Build a replacement fix PR from current main preserving HemantSudarshan credit.
Create an executable replacement artifact for the uneditable #83227 branch rather than asking for maintainer judgment.
Plan a guarded replacement PR only; no GitHub mutation is performed in plan mode.
This exact PR appears to involve plaintext credential/API-key persistence. Quarantine #83296 only; do not let it block unrelated PR classifications.
Broad state-model change, active waiting-on-author status, and failing checks make this a maintainer decision rather than a merge or repair recommendation in this shard.
The docs PR looks small and clean, but merge is blocked by missing complete merge preflight proof; maintainer review is the remaining decision.
Repair the contributor branch narrowly by rebasing or refreshing against current main, then rerun focused gateway validation and Codex /review before any merge recommendation.

needs_human: #83296 is security-shaped and must be handled by central OpenClaw security review.
#83368 needs maintainer judgment because it is broad session-state work, waiting on author, and has failing checks.
#93093 needs maintainer merge approval or a complete merge preflight with clean Codex /review.
